# AUTO-GENERATED Men-at-Arms scripted_guis — do not edit by hand
# One spawner effect per MAA key

### Longbowmen Spawner
DI_longbowmen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = longbowmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = longbowmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = longbowmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = longbowmen
			}
		}
	}
}

### Horse Archers Spawner
DI_horse_archers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = horse_archers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = horse_archers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = horse_archers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = horse_archers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Bush Hunter Spawner
DI_bush_hunter_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = bush_hunter
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = bush_hunter
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = bush_hunter
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = bush_hunter
			}
		}
	}
}

### Shomer Spawner
DI_shomer_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = shomer
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = shomer
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = shomer
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = shomer
			}
		}
	}
}

### Asawira Spawner
DI_asawira_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = asawira
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = asawira
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = asawira
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = asawira
			}
		}
	}
}

### Tarkhan Spawner
DI_tarkhan_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = tarkhan
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = tarkhan
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = tarkhan
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = tarkhan
			}

### Teutonic Knights Spawner
DI_teutonic_knights_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = teutonic_knights
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = teutonic_knights
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = teutonic_knights
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = teutonic_knights
			}
		}
	}
}

DI_light_footmen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {

			limit = {

			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }

				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

					men_at_arms = {
						type = light_footmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = light_footmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = light_footmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = light_footmen

### Bowmen Spawner
DI_bowmen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }

				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

					men_at_arms = {

						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = bowmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = bowmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = bowmen

### Pikemen Unit Spawner
DI_pikemen_unit_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = pikemen_unit
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = pikemen_unit
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = pikemen_unit
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = pikemen_unit
			}
		}
	}
}

### Armored Footmen Spawner
DI_armored_footmen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = armored_footmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = armored_footmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = armored_footmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = armored_footmen
			}
		}
	}
}

### Onager Spawner
DI_onager_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = onager
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = onager
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = onager
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = onager
			}
		}
	}
}

### Armored Horsemen Spawner
DI_armored_horsemen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = armored_horsemen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = armored_horsemen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = armored_horsemen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = armored_horsemen
			}

### Mangonel Spawner
DI_mangonel_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = mangonel
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = mangonel
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = mangonel
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = mangonel
			}
		}
	}
}

### Crossbowmen Spawner
DI_crossbowmen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = crossbowmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = crossbowmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = crossbowmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = crossbowmen
			}
		}
	}

DI_trebuchet_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = trebuchet
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = trebuchet
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = trebuchet
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = trebuchet
			}
		}

### Bombard Spawner
DI_bombard_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = bombard
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = bombard
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = bombard
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = bombard
			}
		}
	}
}

### Handgunners Spawner
DI_handgunners_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = handgunners
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = handgunners
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = handgunners
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = handgunners
			}
		}
	}
}

### House Guard Spawner
DI_house_guard_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = house_guard
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = house_guard
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = house_guard
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = house_guard
			}
		}
	}
}

### Pikemen Militia Spawner
DI_pikemen_militia_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = pikemen_militia
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = pikemen_militia
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = pikemen_militia
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = pikemen_militia
			}
		}
	}
}

### Accolade Maa Archers Spawner
DI_accolade_maa_archers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = accolade_maa_archers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = accolade_maa_archers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = accolade_maa_archers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = accolade_maa_archers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Skoutatoi Spawner
DI_skoutatoi_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = skoutatoi
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = skoutatoi
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = skoutatoi
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = skoutatoi
			}
		}
	}
}

### Varangian Guards Spawner
DI_varangian_guards_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = varangian_guards
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = varangian_guards
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

				men_at_arms = {
					type = varangian_guards
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}

				name = varangian_guards

			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

					men_at_arms = {
						type = handpicked_faithful
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = handpicked_faithful
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = handpicked_faithful
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value

			}

					men_at_arms = {
						type = maa_bandits

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = maa_bandits
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

					type = maa_bandits

### Gakgung Archers Spawner
DI_gakgung_archers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = gakgung_archers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = gakgung_archers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = gakgung_archers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = gakgung_archers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Pesilat Warriors Spawner
DI_pesilat_warriors_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = pesilat_warriors
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = pesilat_warriors
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = pesilat_warriors
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = pesilat_warriors
			}
		}
	}
}

					men_at_arms = {
						type = samurai
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}

					name = samurai
				}
			}

		else = {

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = black_armor_cavalry
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

		}

				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

				save_scope_as = target

					men_at_arms = {
						type = hijos_e_hijas_holy_order

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = hijos_e_hijas_holy_order
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

				men_at_arms = {
					type = hijos_e_hijas_holy_order
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value

### Tacklebacks Spawner
DI_tacklebacks_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = tacklebacks
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = tacklebacks
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = tacklebacks
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = tacklebacks
			}
		}
	}
}

### Golden Spurs Spawner
DI_golden_spurs_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = golden_spurs
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = golden_spurs
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = golden_spurs
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = golden_spurs
			}
		}
	}
}

### Swatters Spawner
DI_swatters_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}

				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = swatters
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = swatters
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = swatters
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = swatters
			}

### Bear Flag Bannermen Spawner
DI_bear_flag_bannermen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = bear_flag_bannermen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = bear_flag_bannermen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = bear_flag_bannermen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = bear_flag_bannermen
			}
		}
	}
}

### Hot Shots Spawner
DI_hot_shots_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = hot_shots
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = hot_shots
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = hot_shots
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = hot_shots
			}
		}
	}
}

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = war_buggies
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = war_buggies
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = war_buggies
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}

				inheritable = no
				name = war_buggies

					}

					}

					inheritable = no
					name = cossack
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

				men_at_arms = {
					type = cossack

				}

					}

					inheritable = no
					name = granadero
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

					}

					name = javalineer

### Picket Line Spawner
DI_picket_line_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = picket_line
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = picket_line
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = picket_line
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = picket_line
			}
		}
	}
}

### Paladin Spawner
DI_paladin_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = paladin
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = paladin
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = paladin
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = paladin
			}
		}
	}
}

			limit = {

			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }

				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = bentwood_warrior
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = bentwood_warrior
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = bentwood_warrior
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value

				name = bentwood_warrior

					men_at_arms = {

					}

					inheritable = no
					name = cowboy
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {

					type = cowboy

						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}

					name = mounties

			}

		else = {

			}

					men_at_arms = {

						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = stripling
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

					}

					inheritable = no
					name = special_agents
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = special_agents

					men_at_arms = {

						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}

					inheritable = no
					name = watchmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {

### Ostensive Patrols Spawner
DI_ostensive_patrols_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = ostensive_patrols
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = ostensive_patrols
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = ostensive_patrols
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = ostensive_patrols
			}
		}
	}
}

### Jaguar Warriors Spawner
DI_jaguar_warriors_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = jaguar_warriors
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = jaguar_warriors
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = jaguar_warriors
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = jaguar_warriors
			}
		}
	}
}

### Tlacololeros Spawner
DI_tlacololeros_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = tlacololeros
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = tlacololeros
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = tlacololeros
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = tlacololeros
			}
		}
	}
}

DI_rangers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = rangers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = rangers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = rangers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = rangers
			}
		}
	}

			}

					men_at_arms = {
						type = axejacks
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = axejacks
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = axejacks
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location

				name = axejacks

					}

					name = eagle_warriors

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = desert_horsemen
				}
			}
		}

### Machete Fencers Spawner
DI_machete_fencers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = machete_fencers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = machete_fencers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = machete_fencers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = machete_fencers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Vaqueiros Nordestinos Spawner
DI_vaqueiros_nordestinos_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = vaqueiros_nordestinos
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = vaqueiros_nordestinos
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = vaqueiros_nordestinos
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = vaqueiros_nordestinos
			}
		}
	}

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = battery
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = battery
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = battery
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = battery
			}
		}

			}

						type = independence_dragoons

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = independence_dragoons
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = captains_of_the_sands
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = captains_of_the_sands
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = captains_of_the_sands
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = captains_of_the_sands
			}

					}

					inheritable = no
					name = plains_archers

### Blackflag Buccaneers Spawner
DI_blackflag_buccaneers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = blackflag_buccaneers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = blackflag_buccaneers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = blackflag_buccaneers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = blackflag_buccaneers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Stormchasers Spawner
DI_stormchasers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = stormchasers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = stormchasers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = stormchasers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = stormchasers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Armored Engine Cavalry Spawner
DI_armored_engine_cavalry_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = armored_engine_cavalry
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = armored_engine_cavalry
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = armored_engine_cavalry
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = armored_engine_cavalry
			}
		}
	}
}

### Whaler Harpoons Spawner
DI_whaler_harpoons_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = whaler_harpoons
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = whaler_harpoons
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = whaler_harpoons
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = whaler_harpoons
			}
		}
	}
}

### Tokala Cavalry Spawner
DI_tokala_cavalry_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = tokala_cavalry
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = tokala_cavalry
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = tokala_cavalry
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = tokala_cavalry
			}
		}
	}
}
